name: Douyin · 文章发布（Article Publish）
description: 全流程抖音文章发布：上传头图 → 填标题 → 插入正文 → 等CDN → 上传封面(3:4 竖图) → 确认裁剪 → 发布。需要先登录 creator.douyin.com。

auth.hint: 请先在浏览器登录 creator.douyin.com，并确保 Chrome 已以 --remote-debugging-port 启动（端口可由 ziniao 自管）。

content_html.description: 文章正文 HTML（含 标签）。建议将 HTML 写入文件，用 @file.html 引用。

head_image.description: 头图文件路径（嵌在正文里显示，推荐 16:9，≥1280x720）

cover_image.description: 封面图（推荐页展示用），必须 3:4 竖图、分辨率 ≥1080x1440。与 head_image 可以不同；若传入横图/低分辨率，抖音会拒绝（toast：封面分辨率过低）。

steps.script: (() => { const ti = document.querySelector('input[placeholder*="标题"]'); if (!ti) return 'no_title_input'; const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; setter.call(ti, window.__flow_vars.title); ti.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true})); ti.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); return 'ok'; })()

(() => { const e = document.querySelector('.editor-DoqDrA'); if (!e) return 'no_editor'; const f = Object.keys(e).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactFiber')); if (!f) return 'no_fiber'; let c = e[f], ed = null; for (let i = 0; i < 20 && c; i++) { const s = c.memoizedState; if (s) { let h = s; while (h) { const v = h.memoizedState; if (v && typeof v === 'object' && v.editor && v.editor.commands && typeof v.editor.commands.insertContent === 'function') { ed = v.editor; break; } h = h.next; } } if (ed) break; c = c.return; } if (!ed) return 'no_tiptap'; ed.commands.clearContent(); ed.commands.insertContent(window.__flow_vars.content_html); return 'ok'; })()

(async () => { for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const imgs = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror')?.querySelectorAll('img') || []; let cdn = 0, total = imgs.length; imgs.forEach(im => { if (!im.src.startsWith('blob:') && !im.src.startsWith('data:')) cdn++; }); if (total > 0 && cdn >= total) return JSON.stringify({cdn, total, ready: true}); } return JSON.stringify({ready: false}); })()

(() => { const icons = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=addIcon]')]; if (icons.length < 2) return 'only_' + icons.length + '_icons'; icons[1].setAttribute('data-ziniao-cover', '1'); return 'marked'; })()

(() => { const modal = document.querySelector('.semi-modal-body, .semi-modal-content'); if (!modal) return 'no_modal'; const b = [...modal.querySelectorAll('button')].find(x => (x.innerText || '').trim() === '确定' && !x.disabled); if (!b) return 'no_confirm_btn'; const pk = Object.keys(b).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactProps')); if (pk && b[pk]?.onClick) { b[pk].onClick(); return 'confirm_clicked'; } b.click(); return 'confirm_native'; })()

(async () => { for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const open = document.querySelector('.semi-modal-body'); if (!open) return 'closed'; } return 'still_open'; })()

(() => { const btns = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(e => (e.innerText || '').trim() === '发布' && e.offsetWidth > 0 && !e.disabled); const btn = btns[btns.length - 1]; if (!btn) return 'no_btn'; const pk = Object.keys(btn).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactProps')); if (pk && btn[pk]?.onClick) { btn[pk].onClick(); return 'clicked'; } btn.click(); return 'native'; })()

(async () => { for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); if (location.href !== window.__flow_before_publish) return JSON.stringify({ok: true, reason: 'url_changed', url: location.href}); const toasts = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=toast]')].map(n => (n.innerText || '').trim()).filter(Boolean); const ok = toasts.find(t => t.includes('发布成功')); if (ok) return JSON.stringify({ok: true, reason: 'toast', toast: ok}); const err = toasts.find(t => t && !t.includes('发布成功')); if (err && i > 4) return JSON.stringify({ok: false, reason: 'toast_error', toast: err}); } return JSON.stringify({ok: false, reason: 'timeout', url: location.href}); })()
